# About {.unnumbered}

This is a project of the
[Phyletica Lab](https://phyletica.org)
to experiment with ways of improving comparative biogeographical
estimates of shared times of divergence or population-size change
across taxa.

The goal of this documentation is to:

1.  Aid members of the project to work collaboratively
2.  Allow others to follow allong with the project, reproduce our findings, and
    learn how to use and interpret the models we are testing.

The ultimate arbiter of the project's full history is the
[project repository](https://github.com/phyletica/ecoevolity-hyper-time).
